local_agency: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene
description: Provides nutritious foods, nutrition education, breastfeeding support, and health referrals for pregnant and postpartum women, infants, and children under 5.

eligibility.categorical_requirement: Must be pregnant, postpartum (up to 6 months, or 12 months if breastfeeding), or an infant/child under age 5.
eligibility.adjunctive_eligibility: Automatically eligible if receiving Medicaid, SNAP, or TANF.
eligibility.notes: Income test applies to the individual, not the whole household, in some states.

apply_in_person: Visit a NYC WIC center. Find locations: https://www.nyc.gov/site/doh/health/health-topics/wic-find-a-clinic.page
how_to_apply: Call 311 or visit a NYC WIC center with proof of identity, residency, and income.
